intent: Analysis: 'the scientific method — canonical vs. practised'. (1) Wikipedia — 'Scientific method', 'Philosophy of science', and 'Thomas Kuhn'. Pull 5+ facts on falsification, paradigm shifts, and reproducibility. (2) Reddit /f/AskScience — 3+ posts on where practising scientists say they diverge from the textbook method. Close with a short commentary on the replication crisis. Cite every claim.
